data.title: Sitewide cleanup: delete Pretext components after all per-page Apply tasks migrate their callsites

data.body: Sitewide directive (2026-06-08): each per-page Apply task rips out its page's PretextParagraph/PretextHeading/PretextLabel callsites and replaces with normal body elements using canonical text utilities (.text-body, .text-body-lead, etc.). When the last callsite migrates, this task deletes the unused Pretext components, the use-pretext hook, and the @chenglou/pretext / src/lib/typeset dependencies if fully unused. Depends_on: all 10 per-page Apply tasks (FRAC-21, FRAC-23, FRAC-25, FRAC-27, FRAC-29, FRAC-31, FRAC-33, FRAC-35, FRAC-37, FRAC-39). Add explicit depends_on edges as those tasks advance. Current callsites: src/components/sections/LiberalArts.tsx (4 instances), src/pages/NeighborhoodPage.tsx (1), src/pages/LabPage.tsx (1 — covered by FRAC-21).

data.reason: Work completed via direct page edits; tracking task closed retroactively per user confirmation

provenance.reason: Work completed via direct page edits; tracking task closed retroactively per user confirmation
